summary: Backend validation iter162 — Web Radio + Avatar persistence + 80% TV promo. 7/8 tests passed, 1 purchase test skipped because a fresh registered user cannot meet level/fame requirements for 'emittente_tv'. All radio endpoints, banner state transitions, avatar base64 persistence across re-login, and UserResponse new fields (logo_url, radio_promo_status) verified.

minor.issue: 80% discount math + radio_promo consumption NOT executed end-to-end: fresh throwaway users cannot satisfy emittente_tv level/fame requirements. Main agent should run a smoke test on a high-level test account OR expose an admin/grant endpoint for the testing agent to seed level+fame+funds. Code inspection confirms lines 232-240 apply cost*0.20 and lines 272-275 mark status='used', but runtime assertion was not made.

Some stations use .m3u8 HLS URLs (Radio Italia, Radio Deejay, Radio Capital). HTML5 <audio> in Chromium/Firefox does NOT play HLS natively — will fail silently in browser unless hls.js is wired up. Frontend RadioPlayer likely can't play 3/20 stations out-of-the-box.

NeoMorpheus's stored avatar_url in DB is a stale ephemeral path '/api/avatar/image/25e2aa00-...png' (set before the persist_base64_avatar fix). The file may no longer exist on disk after container restart. The fix prevents NEW conversions but does NOT heal existing corrupted users. Consider a one-time migration/heal script.

action_items: HLS stream incompatibility: Either (a) replace the 3 .m3u8 Italian stations with MP3/AAC ICY streams, or (b) add hls.js support in RadioPlayer.jsx. Stations affected: radio-italia, radio-deejay, radio-capital.

Optionally: add a one-time migration to re-set avatar_url='' (or default) for users whose avatar_url starts with '/api/avatar/image/' and whose referenced file no longer exists, to heal corrupted Neo-style state.
Optionally: provide an admin seed endpoint so the testing agent can verify the 80% discount purchase end-to-end (currently skipped).
critical_code_review_comments: radio.py – PROMO_DISCOUNT_PERCENT/PROMO_INFRA_TYPES are defined in radio.py but the actual discount logic lives in infrastructure.py with a hardcoded 0.20 multiplier; duplication risks drift. Centralize in a shared constants module.

infrastructure.py L234 – `user.get('radio_promo_status', 'active')` defaults to 'active' for brand-new users AND for existing users without the field. That matches spec but means ANY unset user gets the discount once; confirm this is intentional for legacy users.

auth.py L730-739 – PUT /auth/avatar does NOT validate size/data-URI prefix; a malicious client could store arbitrary large strings in DB. Add length cap (e.g., 300KB) and regex check for `data:image/(jpeg|png|webp);base64,`.
auth.py L282-363 – /auth/login uses print() statements for debugging; replace with logging.debug to avoid noisy stdout.
backend_issues.test_credentials: fandrex1@gmail.com / Fandrel2776 (NeoMorpheus) — radio_promo_status was dismissed during test then restored to 'active' via direct DB update.
backend_issues.seed_data_creation: Created one throwaway user TEST_radio_<uuid>@example.com (via /auth/register) — left in DB, can be cleaned by TEST_ prefix sweep.
backend_issues.context_for_next_testing_agent: Neo's avatar in DB is a stale '/api/avatar/image/...png' URL — pre-existing. The persist_base64_avatar no-op fix is validated (base64 persists across login). For the 80% discount purchase, use a high-level test account or seed level/fame/funds directly in DB to get past emittente_tv requirements.
backend_issues.rca of the issue: N/A — feature validation, no bugs to RCA. Three action items listed (HLS, avatar migration, admin seed endpoint) are enhancements.
